items.title: Appointment of Independent Audit Firm
items.content:
Koç Holding A.Ş. has appointed Güney Bağımsız Denetim ve Serbest Muhasebeci Mali Müşavirlik A.Ş. as its independent audit firm for the 2025 fiscal year.

At the general assembly meeting held on 03.04.2025, Güney Bağımsız Denetim ve Serbest Muhasebeci Mali Müşavirlik A.Ş. was selected as the independent audit firm for the audit of the company's 2025 financial reports and the mandatory sustainability assurance audit of the 2024 and 2025 reports in accordance with the Turkish Commercial Code No. 6102 and the Capital Markets Law No. 6362. This includes all other activities within the scope of the relevant regulations.

items.title: Koç Holding A.Ş. - Kar Payı Dağıtım İşlemlerine İlişkin Bildirim
items.content:
Koç Holding A.Ş. announced its profit distribution plan for the year. The General Assembly approved the distribution of dividends, with a payment date set for April 10, 2025.

The announcement details the cash dividend distribution for A and B group shares. For each 1 TL nominal value share, a gross dividend of 6.88 TL is to be paid. After a 15% withholding tax for B group shares, the net dividend is 5.848 TL per share. The dividend payment will commence on April 10, 2025, with the record date for determining shareholders entitled to the dividend being April 11, 2025, for shares traded on the stock exchange and April 14, 2025, as the payment date.
